recent_player_actions.text: Galinor approaches one of the stern looking guards. "You, watchman. Where is your Captain?"
Galinor approaches one of the countless refuguees. "Stranger, do you know anything about the missing patrol? I've heard rumor about?"
Galinor returns to the guard he originally approached. "Are you saying your Captain has gone missing?"

frontier_gate.last_player_action_text: Galinor returns to the guard he originally approached. "Are you saying your Captain has gone missing?"

recent_contextual_leads.subject: amidst the masses, a figure in threadbare clothes
guard jerks his chin toward the notice board and says, "i can't tell you where the captain is, but you might find the missing patrol notice there

topic:approach_captain_galinor.last_answer: Guard Captain nods once. "Old Millstone. South road."
topic:approach_captain_galinor.last_player_input: Galinor returns to the guard he originally approached. "Are you saying your Captain has gone missing?"

missing_patrol.last_answer: A notice board lists new taxes, curfews, and a posted warning about a missing patrol.
